title: Palantir rallies 15% for the week as Iran war boosts prospects, muting Anthropic concern
summary_full: Palantir's stock had its best week since August and outperformed all of its large-cap tech peers after the U.S. attacked Iran.
summary_public: Palantir's stock had its best week since August and outperformed all of its large-cap tech peers after the U.S. attacked Iran.
